channel.title: testing on yy小站
channel.description: Recent content in testing on yy小站

item.title: Debian升级Testing
item.description: 执行命令 美国源为例，阿里源改为http://mirrors.aliyun.com/debian/即可 1 2 3 echo 'deb http://ftp.us.debian.org/debian/ testing main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/testing.list sudo apt-get update && apt-get -y upgrade sudo
